# Travelomate

## About
Travelomate is a travel intelligence platform for sports leagues and enterprise teams, combining automation with 24/7 human support.

## Primary URLs
- https://travelomate.co.in/
- https://travelomate.co.in/sports-leagues
- https://travelomate.co.in/corporate-teams
- https://travelomate.co.in/self-booking

- https://travelomate.co.in/solutions/executive-assistants
- https://travelomate.co.in/solutions/human-resources
- https://travelomate.co.in/solutions/operations-teams

- https://travelomate.co.in/solutions/construction

- https://travelomate.co.in/solutions/transportation-logistics
